Component.Name: CoNumEdit
Component.Caption: C(CoNumStatic)
Component.DefaultFrom: CoNumCoLines(CoType, Adr0Name, CoOrderDate, CoCreditHold, Whse, CoCustNum, CoTaxCode1, CoTaxCode2, AdrCurrCode, CurrencyAmtFormat, CurrencyCstPrcFormat, CoOrigSite, CoConsignment, CoCustSeq, CoStat)

Component.Name: CoNumFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 13; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 41; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Center; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0.3,0.625,0.17) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 6; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN2)

Component.Name: CustNameFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 60; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 4; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN2)

Component.Name: CustNumEdit
Component.Caption: C(CustNumStatic)
Component.DefaultFrom: CustNumForDropShipTo(DerDropShipToAddr, , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , P(CustNum), ShipToAddr_1, ShipToAddr_2, ShipToAddr_3, ShipToAddr_4, ShipToCity, ShipToCountry, ShipToName, ShipToState, ShipToZip)

Component.Name: CustNumGridCol
Component.Caption: sDropShip
Component.DefaultFrom: CustNumForDropShipTo(DerDropShipToAddr, , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , , P(CustNum), ShipToAddr_1, ShipToAddr_2, ShipToAddr_3, ShipToAddr_4, ShipToCity, ShipToCountry, ShipToName, ShipToState, ShipToZip)

Component.Name: CustSeqEdit
Component.Caption: C(CustSeqStatic)
Component.DefaultFrom: CustSeqDropShipToAllow0(CustNum, , , , , , , , , , ShipToAddr_1, ShipToAddr_2, ShipToAddr_3, ShipToAddr_4, ShipToCity, ShipToCountry, ShipToName, ShipToState, ShipToZip)

Component.Name: CustSeqGridCol
Component.DefaultFrom: CustSeqDropShipToAllow0(CustNum, , , , , , , , , , ShipToAddr_1, ShipToAddr_2, ShipToAddr_3, ShipToAddr_4, ShipToCity, ShipToCountry, ShipToName, ShipToState, ShipToZip)

Component.Name: DetailFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 100; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 23; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Center; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(ButtonBarVisible) = 1; ANIM: FromRight; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(1) TARGET(UNKNOWN1)

Component.Name: flexLayout1
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 37.375; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1_SITE; VALUE: 30; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 30; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #GV(IsCSIB_79704ActiveVar) = "1"; VISINDESIGN: True) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN2)

Component.Name: HeaderFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 20; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Center; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0.3,0,0.17) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 75; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0.2,0,0) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 23; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; ANIM: FromRight) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN7; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0) TARGET(UNKNOWN0)

Component.Name: ItemEdit
Component.Caption: C(ItemStatic)
Component.ComboListSource: STDMC SL.SLItemCusts.CLM_GetItemsForCustItemSp( V(lsm1_ItemEdit) PROPERTIES(Item, ItmDescription, DerIsInventoryItem) DISPLAY(1,2,3))

Component.Name: ItemGridCol
Component.ComboListSource: STDMC SL.SLItemCusts.CLM_GetItemsForCustItemSp( V(lsm1_ItemGridCol) PROPERTIES(Item, ItmDescription, DerIsInventoryItem) DISPLAY(1,2,3))

Component.Name: MainFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(VerticalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 25fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 84fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: PromotionCodeEdit
Component.Caption: C(PromotionCodeStatic)
Component.DefaultFrom: CoPromotionCode(CoNum, Whse, Item, CoOrderDate, PromotionCode, PromotionCodeValidate, CoCustNum, CoCustSeq, , V(FIPVar))

Component.Name: PromotionCodeGridCol
Component.DefaultFrom: CoPromotionCode(CoNum, Whse, Item, CoOrderDate, PromotionCode, PromotionCodeValidate, CoCustNum, CoCustSeq,,V(FIPVar))

Component.Name: ReasoncodeEdit
Component.Caption: sReasoncode
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLPriceDiscreReason( PROPERTIES(reason_code,description) DISPLAY(1,2)FILTER(reason_class='PRICE DISCRE' and site_ref=ISNULL(FC(ShipSiteEdit),FV(Parm_Site)))ORDERBY(reason_code))

Component.Name: ReasonCodeGridCol
Component.Caption: sReasoncode
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLPriceDiscreReason( PROPERTIES(reason_code,description) DISPLAY(1,2)FILTER(reason_class='PRICE DISCRE' and site_ref=ISNULL(FC(ShipSiteEdit),FV(Parm_Site)))ORDERBY(reason_code))

ActiveXComponentProperty.Properties: <chart animation="1" paletteColors="#A8E1E1,#FCC888" showLabels="0" rotateLabels="0" slantLabels="0" showValues="0" rotateValues="0" placeValuesInside="0" showYAxisValues="1" showLimits="1" showDivLineValues="1" showShadow="0" adjustDiv="1" rotateYAxisName="1" showSum="0" stack100Percent="0" showPercentValues="0" showPercentInToolTip="0" setAdaptiveYMin="0" centerYaxisName="1" connectNullData="0" rotateXAxisName="1" use3DLighting="0" centerXaxisName="0" showBorder="0" bgAlpha="0" showVLineLabelBorder="0" showCanvasBorder="0" showCanvasBg="1" showCanvasBase="1" useRoundEdges="0" showPlotBorder="0" plotBorderDashed="0" plotFillAngle="0" plotFillRatio="100" plotFillAlpha="98" plotGradientColor="666666" plotFillColor="0" overlapColumns="0" lineDashed="0" drawAnchors="1" divLineIsDashed="0" showAlternateHGridColor="1" showAlternateVGridColor="1" vDivLineIsDashed="0" showZeroPlane="1" showLegend="1" legendShadow="1" reverseLegend="0" legendItemFontBold="0" legendCaptionBold="0" formatNumber="1" formatNumberScale="1" forceDecimals="0" forceYAxisValueDecimals="0" baseFont="Arial" showToolTip="1" seriesNameInToolTip="1" showToolTipShadow="0" captionOnTop="1" captionFontBold="1" subCaptionFontBold="1" alignCaptionWithCanvas="1" xAxisNameFontBold="1" xAxisNameFontItalic="0" xAxisNameBorderIsDashed="0" yAxisNameFontBold="1" yAxisNameFontItalic="0" yAxisNameBorderIsDashed="0" valueFontBold="0" valueFontItalic="0" valueBorderDashed="0" showValuesOnHover="0" showHoverEffect="0" plotHoverEffect="0"><trendLines><line /><line /></trendLines></chart>

<chart animation="1" paletteColors="#8ABFF7,#A1E4BF" showLabels="0" rotateLabels="0" slantLabels="0" showValues="0" rotateValues="0" placeValuesInside="0" showYAxisValues="1" showLimits="1" showDivLineValues="1" showShadow="0" adjustDiv="1" rotateYAxisName="1" showSum="0" stack100Percent="0" showPercentValues="0" showPercentInToolTip="0" setAdaptiveYMin="0" centerYaxisName="1" connectNullData="0" rotateXAxisName="1" use3DLighting="0" centerXaxisName="0" showBorder="0" bgAlpha="0" showVLineLabelBorder="0" showCanvasBorder="1" showCanvasBg="1" showCanvasBase="1" useRoundEdges="0" showPlotBorder="1" plotBorderDashed="0" plotFillAngle="0" plotFillRatio="100" plotFillAlpha="98" plotGradientColor="666666" plotFillColor="0" overlapColumns="0" lineDashed="0" drawAnchors="1" divLineIsDashed="0" showAlternateHGridColor="1" showAlternateVGridColor="1" vDivLineIsDashed="0" showZeroPlane="1" showLegend="1" legendShadow="1" reverseLegend="0" legendItemFontBold="0" legendCaptionBold="0" formatNumber="1" formatNumberScale="1" forceDecimals="0" forceYAxisValueDecimals="0" baseFont="Arial" showToolTip="1" seriesNameInToolTip="1" showToolTipShadow="0" captionOnTop="1" captionFontBold="1" subCaptionFontBold="1" alignCaptionWithCanvas="1" xAxisNameFontBold="1" xAxisNameFontItalic="0" xAxisNameBorderIsDashed="0" yAxisNameFontBold="1" yAxisNameFontItalic="0" yAxisNameBorderIsDashed="0" valueFontBold="0" valueFontItalic="0" valueBorderDashed="0" showValuesOnHover="0" showHoverEffect="0" plotHoverEffect="0"><trendLines><line /></trendLines></chart>

EventHandler.Name: AddTrnLoc
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItemLocs.ItemLocAddRemoteSp( PARMS(VAR V(LocWhse), VAR P(Item), VAR V(TrnLoc), VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR V(TrnLocQuestionAsked), VAR V(LocSite), RVAR V(RowPointer), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CalculatePrice
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoBlns.CalculateCoitemPriceSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), VAR P(CustItem), VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), VAR P(Pricecode), RVAR P(PriceConv), MESSAGE, VAR P(CoLine), RVAR P(UbDispMsg), VAR P(Whse), RVAR P(Disc), VAR, VAR P(PromotionCode)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CalculatePriceOnAU
EventHandler.Response: SLCoBlns.AU_CalculateCoLineReleasePriceSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), VAR P(CustItem), VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(DueDate), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), VAR P(Pricecode), RVAR P(PriceConv), MESSAGE, VAR P(CoLine), RVAR P(UbDispMsg), VAR P(Whse), RVAR P(Disc), VAR, VAR P(PromotionCode)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CalculateStandardPrice
EventHandler.Response: SLCoBlns.CalculateCoitemPriceSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), VAR P(CustItem), VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), VAR P(Pricecode), RVAR P(standard_price), MESSAGE, VAR P(CoLine), RVAR P(UbDispMsg), VAR P(Whse), RVAR P(standard_disc), VAR, VAR P(PromotionCode)) )

EventHandler.Name: CalculateStandardPriceOnAU
EventHandler.Response: SLCoBlns.CalculateCoitemPriceSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), VAR P(CustItem), VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(DueDate), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), VAR P(Pricecode), RVAR P(standard_price), MESSAGE, VAR P(CoLine), RVAR P(UbDispMsg), VAR P(Whse), RVAR P(standard_disc), RVAR, VAR P(PromotionCode), VAR P(AUContractPriceMethod), VAR P(UbContractID)) )

EventHandler.Name: CheckCoStatus
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoItems.CheckCoStatusSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoType), VAR V(CoNumList), RVAR V(CoNumAndStatList), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ChkXRef
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.ChkXrefWarningSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum),VAR P(CoLine),VAR P(CoRelease),VAR P(RefType),VAR P(RefNum),VAR P(RefLineSuf),VAR P(RefRelease),RVAR V(WarningMsg)))

EventHandler.Name: CleanUpTransNextKey
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLTransfers.TransNextKeyDelSp( PARMS(VAR V(LastKeyRefNum), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mblank) )

EventHandler.Name: CopyConfig
EventHandler.Response: SLCfgMains.CfgCopyConfigSp( PARMS(VAR P(UbSourceConfigID), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: CreateItem
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLFeatqties.ItemCreateFromFeatStrSp( PARMS(VAR P(FeatStr), VAR V(ItemVar), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), VAR 0, VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(UbIncrPrice), RVAR P(Item), MESSAGE, VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(DerLinePlant)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CreateTransferOrder
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.CitemXSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(RefType), VAR V(CurRefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(UM), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(DueDate), VAR P(Whse), RVAR V(RefLineSuf), RVAR V(XrefDestination), RVAR V(CreateFlag), RVAR V(CreateFlag2), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: DataChangeCommCode
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCommodities.GetSupplQtyConvFactorSp( PARMS(VAR P(CommCode), RVAR V(vSupplQtyFactor), RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: DefineVariable
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR V(vDoSubJobs), VAR V(vResponse), RVAR V(vInfobar)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: DropShipChanged
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_DropShipChanged_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.Components("CustNumEdit").Text = "" Then ThisForm.Components("CustSeqEdit").Text = "0" ThisForm.Components("CustSeqGridCol").Text = "0" ThisForm.Components("CustSeqEdit").Required = False Th
EventHandler.Response2: isForm.Components("CustSeqGridCol").Required = False ThisForm.Components("CustSeqEdit").SetModifiedSinceLoadOrValidation(False) ThisForm.Components("CustSeqGridCol").SetModifiedSinceLoadOrValidation(False) ReturnValue = "-1" End If End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: FeatQtySave
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLFeatqties.FeatQtySaveSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR V(Feature), VAR V(OptCode), VAR V(MatlQty), VAR V(UM), VAR V(FeatureItem), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: FeatureGroupSelected
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLFeatranks.ProdConfExcludeOptCodeSp( PARMS(VAR C(FGFeatureGridCol), VAR P(FeatStr), VAR C(FGItemGridCol), VAR C(FGOperNumGridCol), RVAR V(ExcludeOptCode), VAR P(ShipSite)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: FormPermissionsCheck
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.UserNames.CanAny( PARMS(VAR V(vAction), VAR V(vFormName), RVAR V(VCanDo)) )

EventHandler.Name: FRGetDefaultItemOrigin
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.FRGetOrigin( PARMS(VAR P(Item), RVAR P(Origin), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: FRGetDefaultItemTaxCodes
EventHandler.Response: SLItemcusts.DefaultItemTaxCodesByCustomerItem( PARMS(VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(Item), VAR P(CoNum), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(TaxCode2), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: FRGetDefaultItemTaxCodes
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLTaxcodes.TaxDescSp( PARMS(VAR item, VAR P(TaxCode1), VAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Tc1Description), RVAR P(Tc2Description)) )

EventHandler.Name: FRNonItemValidate
EventHandler.Response: SLItems.NonItemValidator( PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR V(AllowNonItemVar), RVAR V(NonItemSeverity), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetCoNonInvAcct
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.GetCoNonInvAcctSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(Item), VAR P(Whse), RVAR P(NonInvAcct), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit1), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit2), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit3), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit4), RVAR P(NonInvAccessUnit1), RVAR P(NonInvAccessUnit2), RVAR P(NonInvAccessUnit3), RVAR P(NonInvAccessUnit4), RVAR V(PostJourVar), MESSAGE, VAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(NonInvIsControl)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetDIFOTPolicy
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.GetDIFOTPolicySp( PARMS(VAR, VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR, VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(CustSeq), VAR 4, RVAR P(ShippedOverOrderedQtyTolerance), RVAR P(ShippedUnderOrderedQtyTolerance), RVAR P(DaysShippedAfterDueDateTolerance), RVAR P(DaysShippedBeforeDueDateTolerance)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetDropShip
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.CoitemDropShipChangedSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(Item), VAR P(CustNum), VAR P(CustSeq), VAR P(CoTaxCode1), VAR P(CoTaxCode2), VAR P(TaxCode1), VAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(DerDropShipToAddr), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR V(TaxCode1), RVAR V(TaxCode2), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetDropShip
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLTaxcodes.TaxDescSp( PARMS(VAR item, VAR P(TaxCode1), VAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Tc1Description), RVAR P(Tc2Description)) )

EventHandler.Name: GetMakevsBuyAnalysis
EventHandler.Response: SLFeatranks.GetMakeOrBuyDecision( PARMS(VAR P(Item), RVAR P(AvgManufacturedUnitCost), RVAR P(AvgPurchasedUnitCost), RVAR P(MaxResourceUtilization), RVAR V(statusCode), RVAR V(MESSAGE)) ERRORMESSAGE(V(MESSAGE)) )

EventHandler.Name: GetNonInvItemInfo
EventHandler.Response: SLItemsNonInventoryItems.GetNonInvItemInfoSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), RVAR P(Description), RVAR P(UM), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR, RVAR P(CostConv), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(UnitWeight), RVAR P(PriceConv), RVAR P(AllowOnPickList), MESSAGE, VAR P(AdrCurrCode), VAR O, VAR P(CoNum)) )

EventHandler.Name: GetParms
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLRepRules.IsObjectReplicatedSp( PARMS(VAR V(Parm_Site), VAR custaddr_mst, VAR 1, RVAR V(SharedCustEnabled)) )

EventHandler.Name: GetTransferDefaults
EventHandler.Response: Sl.SLTransfers.TransferDefaultsSp( PARMS(VAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(Whse), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetVATCodeForCustomerOrder
EventHandler.Response: SLPLDefaultCoitemTaxCodes.PLGetVATCodeForCustomerOrder( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(Item), VAR COI, VAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR P(TaxCode1), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GotoTrackingNumberURL
EventHandler.Response: SLCoships.GetShipmentTrackingURLSp( PARMS(VAR P(SLCoShipAlls.ShipmentId), VAR P(SLCoShipAlls.TrackingNumber), RVAR V(TrackingNumberURL)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: IsCoitemXreferenced
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.IsCoitemXreferencedSp( PARMS(VAR P(RefType),VAR P(RefNum),VAR P(RefLineSuf),VAR P(RefRelease),RVAR V(Xreferenced)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ItemChangedInventoryItem
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.ItemUnitWeightSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), RVAR P(UnitWeight), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ItemValidate
EventHandler.Response: SLCoItems.GetItemInfoSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR V(ItemExists), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR V(MessageVar), MESSAGE, RVAR P(ShipSite), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR , RVAR V(IsOpenNonInvForm)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ItemValidateInventory
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItems.ObsSlowSp_New( PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 1, MESSAGE, RVAR V(ItemObsSlowPrompt), RVAR V(ItemObsSlowPromptButtons), VAR P(ShipSite), VAR 0, VAR 1) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchConfig
EventHandler.Response: SLCfgMains.HandleDocumentAuto( PARMS(VAR P(ConfigID), VAR P(RowPointer), VAR COLINE, VAR SyteLineDocument, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchFormItemContentReferences
EventHandler.Response: ItemContentReferences( SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh, ItemVar=P(Item), EffectDateVar=P(CoOrderDate), RefTypeVar=O, RefNumVar=P(CoNum), RefLineSufVar=P(CoLine)) LINKBY(Item=Item,CoOrderDate=EffectDate,CoLine=RefLineSuf,DerRefType=RefType,CoNum=RefNum) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(ItemVar=P(Item), EffectDateVar=P(CoOrderDate), RefTypeVar=O, RefNumVar=P(CoNum), RefLineSufVar=P(CoLine)) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchProdConfig
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_LaunchProdConfig_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() ThisForm.Variables("NewDesc").Value = ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("Description") End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchProdConfig
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLFeatqties.ItemFeatureCheckSp( PARMS(VAR P(FeatStr), VAR P(Item), VAR V(FeatQtys), RVAR V(NewItem), RVAR V(InvparmsCreateFeat), RVAR V(CreateItemMsg), RVAR V(CreateItemButtons), MESSAGE, RVAR V(NewDesc), VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(DerLinePlant)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchWebConfig
EventHandler.Response: Configuration( OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(WebURL=V(WebURL), ApplID=V(ApplID), OrderType=V(OrderType), Key1=V(Key1), Key2=V(Key2), ConfigID=V(ConfigID), Reconfiguration=V(Reconfiguration), JobFlag=V(JobFlag), ApplIDShipSite=V(ApplIDShipSite), ConfigWebUrl=V(ConfigWebUrl), CEP=V(CEP), Job=V(Job), Suffix=V(Suffix), XRefFlag=V(XRefFlag), CfgSource=V(CfgSource), ShipSite=V(ShipSite), AutoJob=V(AutoJob), PartNumber=V(PartNumber), sQty=V(QtyOrderedConv), sUOM=PV(UM), sPartNumber=V(sPartNumber), sP
EventHandler.Response2: arentConfigId=V(sParentConfigId), sNameSpace=V(sNameSpace), sGroupName=V(sGroupName), sCurrencyCode=P(AdrCurrCode), IsPending=V(IsPending), sCoOrigSite=V(sCoOrigSite)) )

EventHandler.Name: ListConfiguration
EventHandler.Response: ProductConfigurationList( OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(FeatStr=P(FeatStr), Item=P(Item), CoNum=P(CoNum), CoLine=P(CoLine)) )

EventHandler.Name: ListEstimatedCharges
EventHandler.Response: EstimatedTotalCharges( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(PTable=co_all, PSite=V(Parm_Site), PCoNum=P(CoNum), PCalcTax=1) )

EventHandler.Name: msgCanSetCoStatus
EventHandler.Response: MsgApp(Clear, Prompt, ReturnAction, mQ=IsCompareWillSet1NoYes, STRINGS(sStatus), @sCoStatus=V(CoStat), @sCoStatus=C,STRINGS(sCustomerOrder), STRINGS(sCoNum), VV(CoNum))

EventHandler.Name: MultiSiteItemSourcingBtnClick
EventHandler.Response: MultiSiteItemSourcing( OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(vCoNum=P(CoNum), vCoLine=P(CoLine), vCoRelease=P(CoRelease), vItem=P(Item), vQtyOrderedConv=P(QtyOrderedConv), vDropShipCustNum=P(CustNum), vDropShipCustSeq=P(CustSeq), vDerNonInventoryItemFlag=P(DerNonInventoryItemFlag), vDueDate=P(DueDate), vRequestDate=P(PromiseDate), vRefType=P(RefType), vRefNum=P(RefNum), vRefLineSuf=P(RefLineSuf), vStat=P(Stat), vUOM=P(UM), vQtyShipped=P(DerQtyShippedConv), vQtyRsvd=P(DerQtyRsvdConv), vShipSite=P(ShipS

EventHandler.Name: PriceValid
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.CoitemValidatePriceSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(Item), VAR P(PriceConv), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: PromotionCodeValidate
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.PromotionCodeValidSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(Whse), VAR P(Item), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(PromotionCode), VAR P(UM), VAR P(CustItem), VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), VAR P(Pricecode), VAR P(PriceConv), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(Whse), MESSAGE, VAR , VAR , VAR , VAR ) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: PromptForWhse
EventHandler.Response: PromptForWarehouseData( OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(TrnNum=P(RefNum), ToWhse=P(Whse), ToSite=V(ParmSite), FromSite=V(FromSite), FromWhse=V(FromWhse), CalledFrom=V(FormName), Item=P(Item)) )

EventHandler.Name: QtyOrderedValid
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.CoitemValidateQtyOrderedSp( PARMS(VAR V(NewRecordFlag), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(Item), VAR P(UM), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), VAR P(Pricecode), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(CustItem), VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(Whse), VAR P(RefType), VAR P(PriceConv), RVAR P(DerQtyReadyConv), MESSAGE, RVAR P(UbDispMsg)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: RemoveConfigHold
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.CfgRemoveConfigurationHoldSp( PARMS(VAR OR, VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(DerCfgOnHold)) )

EventHandler.Name: ReserveLine
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.ResvCoitemSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: RunCTP
EventHandler.Response: CTPResults( SETVARVALUES(CTPCalledFrom=CustomerOrderLines, V_CoLine=P(CoLine), V_CoNum=P(CoNum), V_CoRelease=P(CoRelease), V_Item=P(Item), V_QtyOrdered=P(QtyOrderedConv)) )

EventHandler.Name: SetDueDate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.CoDuePerSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR V(ICDuePeriod), VAR P(CustItem), VAR P(Whse)) )

EventHandler.Name: SetValueForPricingEngine
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR No.Of.RecordModified, VAR V(No.Of.RecordModified), RVAR V(vInfobar)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ShowCTPResults
EventHandler.Response: CTPResults( SETVARVALUES(CTPCalledFrom=CustomerOrderLines, V_CoLine=P(CoLine), V_CoNum=P(CoNum), V_CoRelease=P(CoRelease), V_Item=P(Item), V_QtyOrdered=P(QtyOrderedConv)) )

EventHandler.Name: ShowIt
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_ShowIt_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() MsgBox( _ "ItemEdit: " & ThisForm.Components("ItemEdit").GetModifiedSinceLoadOrValidation & Chr(10) & _ "QtyOrderedConvEdit: " & ThisForm.Components("QtyOrderedConvEdit").GetModifiedSinc
EventHandler.Response2:
eLoadOrValidation & Chr(10) & _ "UMEdit: " & ThisForm.Components("UMEdit").GetModifiedSinceLoadOrValidation & Chr(10) & _ "PriceConvEdit: " & ThisForm.Components("PriceConvEdit").GetModifiedSinceLoadOrValidation & Chr(10) _ )
End Sub
End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormCalledFormReturned
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_StdFormCalledFormReturned_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() 'SSSFS Start { If ThisForm.LastModalChildName = "ServiceOrderQuickCreate" And ThisForm.LastModalChildEndedOk Then ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.RefreshCurrentObject End If 'SSSFS Finish } End Sub End Class End Nam

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.CustomerOrderLinesStdFormPredisplaySp( PARMS(RVAR V(PostJourVar), VAR APS - Override Projected Date, VAR APS - Set DueDate LT Projected, VAR custaddr_mst, VAR V(Parm_Site), RVAR V(ApsParmApsmode), RVAR V(MrpParmReqSrc), RVAR V(CanDueNEProjected), RVAR V(CanDueLTProjected), RVAR V(SharedCustEnabled), RVAR V(UseAltPriceCalc)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormSave
EventHandler.Description: Pricing Engine has make calls only once for each form save not for each record. Set the number of records modifies and SumCoSp will call PE only once at the end of record

EventHandler.Name: StdFormSaveCompleted
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.UndefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR No.Of.RecordModified, RVAR V(vInfobar)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormSaveCompleted
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.GetVariableSp( PARMS(VAR SumCoSpMaxCoDisc, VAR , VAR 1, RVAR V(CoNumList), MESSAGE) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR CustomerOrderLines, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompletedObject
EventHandler.Response: SETVARVALUES(CoTypeVar=P(CoType), CustNumVar=P(CoCustNum), CurrCodeVar = P(AdrCurrCode), CurrPlacesVar = P(CurrencyPlaces), CoStatVar=P(CoStat), OrderDateVar=P(CoOrderDate), AdrNameVar=P(Adr0Name), CreditHoldVar=P(CoCreditHold), AdrCreditHoldVar=P(AdrCreditHold), OldRefNum=P(RefNum), OldRefType = P(RefType), OldUnitPrice=P(PriceConv), ItemPlanFlag=P(ItPlanFlag), PrevStat=P(Stat), OldRefLineSuf=P(RefLineSuf))

EventHandler.Name: ToggleButtonBar
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace Mongoose.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_ToggleButtonBar_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Value = "1" Then ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").SetValue("0") Else ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").SetValue("1") _x03_
EventHandler.Response2: End If ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: TranslateCurrency
EventHandler.Response: CustomerOrderLinesDomesticCurrency( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum,CoLine=CoLine) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(CoNum = P(CoNum), CoLine=P(CoLine), AdrName=P(Adr0Name), Item = P(Item), ItDescription = P(Description), AdrCurrCode=P(AdrCurrCode), Stat=P(Stat), PriceConv = P(PriceConv), DerNetPrice=P(DerNetPrice), DerExtPrice = P(DerExtPrice), TRate = P(CoExchRate)) )

EventHandler.Name: ValidateDueDate
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.ValidateDueDateSp( PARMS(VAR C, VAR P(DueDate), VAR P(ShipSite), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ValidateFeatStr
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLFeatranks.FeatStrValidateSp( PARMS(VAR C(FeatStrEdit), VAR C(ItemEdit), MESSAGE, VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(DerLinePlant)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: WhseQtyOrderedValid
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.GetItemRefSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR C, RVAR P(RefType), MESSAGE, VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(DerLinePlant)) )

EventHandler.Name: WhseQtyOrderedValid
EventHandler.Response: SLCos.ValidateCOConsignValuesSp( PARMS(VAR, VAR, VAR P(Whse), VAR, VAR P(CoNum), RVAR V(ConsignableOrder), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: XRef
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.CitemXSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease),VAR P(RefType), VAR P(RefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(UM), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(DueDate), VAR P(Whse), RVAR P(RefLineSuf), RVAR V(XrefDestination), RVAR V(CreateFlag), RVAR V(CreateFlag2),RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: XrefCreate
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_XrefCreate_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("RefType") = "S" Then ThisForm.GenerateEvent("SSSFSSROXrefCreate") ReturnValue = "16" 'prevent rest of XrefCreate handlers _x03_
EventHandler.Response2: Else ReturnValue = "0" End If End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: XrefCreate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.CitemXPreSp( PARMS(VAR V(SourceFile), VAR P(RefType), VAR P(RefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(DueDate), RVAR P(RefNum), RVAR V(FromSite), RVAR V(ParmSite), RVAR V(PoChangeOrd), RVAR V(PromptMsg1), RVAR V(PromptButtons1), RVAR V(PromptMsg2), RVAR V(PromptButtons2), RVAR V(PromptMsg3), RVAR V(PromptButtons3), RVAR V(PromptMsg4), RVAR V(PromptButtons4), RVAR V(PromptMsg5), RVAR V(PromptButtons5), MESSAGE, RVAR V(FromWhse), VAR P(DerLinePlant)) ERRORMESSA

Variable.Name: cds_CostAnalysisChart
Variable.Value: chart.object( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(AvgManufacturedUnitCost, AvgPurchasedUnitCost) LEGENDS(sAvgMfgUnitCost, sAvgPurchUnitCost) RENDERASLIST(, ) CHARTSTYLE(Multi-Series Charts) CHARTTYPE(MSColumn2D) CHARTBINDTOCURRENTROW(1))

Variable.Name: cds_ResourceUtilizationChart
Variable.Value: chart.object6( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(UbValue, UbCaption) XAXISLABEL(UbCaption) LEGENDS(sUbValue, sUbCaption) RENDERASLIST(, ) CHARTSTYLE(Single Series Charts) CHARTTYPE(Doughnut2D))

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_FeatureMaterialGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR C(FGFeatureGridCol), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine))

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_FeatureMaterialsGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR C(FGItemGridCol), VAR C(FGFeatureGridCol), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(DerLinePlant))

Variable.Name: DefaultParam
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), RVAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(Stat), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(QtyOrderedConv), RVAR P(DueDate), RVAR,RVAR P(PriceConv), RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TrnDescription),RVAR P(Delterm),RVAR P(DltDescription), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR P(SupplQty), RVAR P(ExportValue), RVAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR,RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(Pricecode), RVAR, RVAR ,RVAR P(Consolidate), RVAR P(Summarize), RVAR P(InvFreq), RVAR P(RefType),RVAR,RV

Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(RefType), VAR V(CurRefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(Description), VAR P(UM), VAR P(CoStat), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(DueDate), VAR V(ToWhse), VAR V(FromWhse), VAR V(FromSite), VAR V(ToSite), VAR V(PoChangeOrd), VAR V(MpwxrefDelete), VAR V(CreateFlag), VAR V(CreateFlag2), RVAR P(RefNum), RVAR P(RefLineSuf), RVAR P(RefRelease), VAR V(TrnLoc), VAR V(FOBSite), RVAR V(TrnLocQuestionAsked), RVAR V(PromptMsg

Variable.Name: ehm1_CustOrderLinesFormDefaults0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), RVAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(Stat), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(QtyOrderedConv), RVAR P(DueDate), RVAR, RVAR P(PriceConv), RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TrnDescription), RVAR P(TransNat2), RVAR P(TransNat2Description), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(DltDescription), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR, RVAR P(ExportValue), RVAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR, RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(Pricecode), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(Consolidate), RVAR P(Summarize),
Variable.Value2: RVAR P(InvFreq), RVAR P(RefType), RVAR P(Transport), RVAR P(CoTaxCode1), RVAR, RVAR P(CoTaxCode2), RVAR, RVAR P(AdrCurrCode), RVAR P(CurrencyAmtFormat), RVAR P(CurrencyCstPrcFormat), RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), RVAR P(SupplQtyConvFactor),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_GetItemInfo0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(NewRecordFlag), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(Item), VAR V(PrevItem), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(Pricecode), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), RVAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(Description), RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(PriceConv), RVAR P(FeatStr), RVAR V(ItemPlanFlag), RVAR P(DerItemFeatTempl), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR P(UnitWeight), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR P(DueDate), RVAR P(RefType), RVAR P(RefNum), RVAR P(RefLineSuf), RVAR P(RefRelease), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(Tc1Descriptio
Variable.Value2: n), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Tc2Description), RVAR P(Disc), MESSAGE, VAR P(CoLine))

Variable.Name: ehm1_GetItemInfo1
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(NewRecordFlag), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoType), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(Item), VAR V(PrevItem), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR, VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(Pricecode), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), RVAR V(vShipSite), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(Description), RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(PriceConv), RVAR P(FeatStr), RVAR V(ItemPlanFlag), RVAR P(DerItemFeatTempl), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR P(UnitWeight), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR P(DueDate), RVAR P(RefType), RVAR P(RefNum), RVAR P(RefLineSuf), RVAR P(RefRelease
Variable.Value2: ), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(Tc1Description), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Tc2Description), RVAR P(Disc), MESSAGE, VAR P(CoLine), RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), RVAR P(SupplQtyConvFactor), RVAR P(ItKit), RVAR P(PrintKitComponents),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_GetItemInfo2
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(NewRecordFlag), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoType), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(Item), VAR V(PrevItem), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR, VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(Pricecode), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), RVAR V(vShipSite), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(Description), RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(PriceConv), RVAR P(FeatStr), RVAR V(ItemPlanFlag), RVAR P(DerItemFeatTempl), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR P(UnitWeight), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR P(DueDate), RVAR P(RefType), RVAR P(RefNum), RVAR P(RefLineSuf), RVAR P(RefRelease
Variable.Value2: ), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(Tc1Description), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Tc2Description), RVAR P(Disc), MESSAGE, VAR P(CoLine), RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), RVAR P(SupplQtyConvFactor), RVAR P(ItKit), RVAR P(PrintKitComponents),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_OrderNoChanged4
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), RVAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(Stat), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(QtyOrderedConv), RVAR P(DueDate), RVAR, RVAR P(PriceConv), RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TrnDescription), RVAR P(TransNat2), RVAR P(TransNat2Description), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(DltDescription), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR, RVAR P(ExportValue), RVAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR, RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(Pricecode), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(Consolidate), RVAR P(Summarize),
Variable.Value2: RVAR P(InvFreq), RVAR P(RefType), RVAR P(Transport), RVAR P(CoTaxCode1), RVAR, RVAR P(CoTaxCode2), RVAR, RVAR P(AdrCurrCode), RVAR P(CurrencyAmtFormat), RVAR P(CurrencyCstPrcFormat), RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), RVAR P(SupplQtyConvFactor),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_OrderNoChanged5
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), RVAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(Stat), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(QtyOrderedConv), RVAR P(DueDate), RVAR, RVAR P(PriceConv), RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TrnDescription), RVAR P(TransNat2), RVAR P(TransNat2Description), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(DltDescription), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR, RVAR P(ExportValue), RVAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR, RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(Pricecode), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(Consolidate), RVAR P(Summarize),
Variable.Value2: RVAR P(InvFreq), RVAR P(RefType), RVAR P(Transport), RVAR P(CoTaxCode1), RVAR, RVAR P(CoTaxCode2), RVAR, RVAR P(AdrCurrCode), RVAR P(CurrencyAmtFormat), RVAR P(CurrencyCstPrcFormat), RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), RVAR P(SupplQtyConvFactor),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_StdObjectNewCompleted0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), RVAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(Stat), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(QtyOrderedConv), RVAR P(DueDate), RVAR, RVAR P(PriceConv), RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TrnDescription), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(DltDescription), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR P(SupplQty), RVAR P(ExportValue), RVAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR, RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(Pricecode), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(Consolidate), RVAR P(Summarize), RVAR P(InvFreq), RVAR P(RefType), RV
Variable.Value2: AR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(AdrCurrCode), RVAR P(CurrencyAmtFormat), RVAR P(CurrencyCstPrcFormat), MESSAGE)

Variable.Name: ehm1_XrefCreate10
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(RefType), VAR P(RefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(Description), VAR P(UM), VAR P(CoStat), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(DueDate), VAR V(ToWhse), VAR P(Whse), VAR V(FromSite), VAR V(ToSite), VAR V(PoChangeOrd), VAR V(MpwxrefDelete), VAR V(CreateFlag), VAR V(CreateFlag2), RVAR P(RefNum), RVAR P(RefLineSuf), RVAR P(RefRelease), VAR V(TrnLoc), VAR V(FOBSite), RVAR V(TrnLocQuestionAsked), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR

Variable.Name: ehm2_CustOrderLinesFormDefaults0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(CoStat), MESSAGE, RVAR P(CusTaxRegNum1ExpDate), RVAR P(CouEcCode), RVAR P(CusTaxCode1Type), RVAR P(TaxRegNum1))

Variable.Name: ehm2_GetItemInfo1
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(ItReservable), RVAR P(ItSerialTracked), RVAR P(DerNetPrice))

Variable.Name: ehm2_GetItemInfo2
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(ItReservable), RVAR P(ItSerialTracked), RVAR P(ItOrderConfigurable), RVAR P(AllowOnPickList))

Variable.Name: ehm2_OrderNoChanged4
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(CoStat), MESSAGE, RVAR P(CusTaxRegNum1ExpDate), RVAR P(CouEcCode), RVAR P(CusTaxCode1Type), RVAR P(TaxRegNum1))

Variable.Name: ehm2_OrderNoChanged5
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(CoStat), MESSAGE, RVAR P(CusTaxRegNum1ExpDate), RVAR P(CouEcCode))

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: SL.SLCoitems( FILTERPERM(CoType='R' ) ORDERBY(CoNum DESC, CoLine, CoRelease) INS(CoitemSavePreProcSp(UbItemCustAdd,UbItemCustUpdate,DerAllowOverCreditLimit,CoNum),DefineVariableSp('PlanOnSave',UbPlanOnSave,MESSAGE),STD,UndefineVariableSp('PlanOnSave',MESSAGE),REF) UPD(CoitemSavePreProcSp(UbItemCustAdd,UbItemCustUpdate,DerAllowOverCreditLimit,CoNum),STD,REF) DEL(ValidatorRefPickListSp(CoNum,CoLine,CoRelease,MESSAGE),STD,REF) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC2
Variable.Value: OBJECT2( SL.SLFeatranks.ProdConfFeatureGroupSp( V(fds1_SecCol2MethodParms) CA(RV) OBJNAME(SL.SLFeatranks) RLACS() DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC3
Variable.Value: OBJECT3( SLFeatranks.ProdConfFeatureGroupSp( V(fds1_SecCol3MethodParms) CA() OBJNAME(SLFeatranks) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC5
Variable.Value: OBJECT5( RS_QCInspCos( CA(RNCSDVIOG) FILTERPERM(RefNum=FP(CoNum) AND Item=FP(Item) AND RefLine=FP(CoLine)) ORDERBY(RcvrNum DESC) LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SecondaryCollections
Variable.Value: V(fds_SC2) V(fds_SC3) V(fds_SC4) V(fds_SC5) V(fds_SC6) V(fds_SC7) V(fds_SC8)

Variable.Name: fds1_SecCol2MethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR P(FeatStr), VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(DerLinePlant))

Variable.Name: fds1_SecCol3MethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR P(FeatStr), VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(DerLinePlant))

Variable.Name: fds1_SecCol6MethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR C(ItemEdit), VAR C(CoNumEdit), VAR C(CoLineEdit))

Variable.Name: lsm1_ItemEdit
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CustItem), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(Item), VAR P(ShipSite), MESSAGE, VAR REFRESHLIST())

Variable.Name: lsm1_ItemGridCol
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CustItem), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(Item), VAR P(ShipSite), MESSAGE, VAR REFRESHLIST())

Variable.Name: No.Of.RecordModified
Variable.Description: Identify # of record modified in the collection. Pricing Engine use this variable to call price at the end of the record.

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: 'Non-Inv Item no need to do this.
'Required to keep site field from forcing modified flag to true.
'Case when run stand alone, not linked, run validator
'If not on the Source tab, don't do this refresh
'If Validation succeeds, then run the Data changed event handler
'May need to do a data changed event also or just fire appropriate events
'Set appropriate properties for Save time action.
If iResponse = vbYes And ThisForm.Variables("ItemCustAdd").Value = "1" Then
ElseIf iResponse = vbYes And ThisForm.Variables("ItemCustUpdate").Value = "1" And ThisForm.Variables("ItemCustAdd").Value = "0" Then
ElseIf iResponse = vbNo And ThisForm.Variables("ItemCustUpdate").Value = "1" And ThisForm.Variables("ItemCustAdd").Value = "1" Then
'Except for Drop Ship tab components, all other components
'should be enabled only if OrigSite = ParmsSite;
'Drop Ship Tab components should be enabled only if ShipSite = ParmsSite
bCanChangeItem = bIsNew Or (Not bIsNew And bPlanned Or bOrdered And dQtyOrd = 0 And dQtyRsvd = 0)
' plus has no releases for bln orders
If (sStat <> "F" And sStat <> "C") And bShipSite Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite Then
If bCanChangeItem And bOrigSite And bExtShipStatEdit Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite And bExtShipStatEdit Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And dQtyShipped = 0 And bOrigSite And Not bSerialTracked And bExtShipStatEdit Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite And bPromotionCodeNull Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or sStat = "F" Or sStat = "C" Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite And Not bNonInventoryItem Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite And Not bNonInventoryItem Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite And bExtShipStatEdit Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite And bExtShipStatEdit Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite Then
' Is this a Buy Design Configuration and is the Job Released, then disable the Ref Fields.
bRefEnabled = (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And (bShipSite Or bIsNew)
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("CoConsignment") = "0" And bCanChangeWhse And bOrigSite Then
If (Not bComplete Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite And bTax1Prompt Then
If (Not bComplete Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite And bTax2Prompt Then
If Not bEdiOrder And (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) Then
If (((bPlanned Or bFeatStrBlank) And Not bComplete) Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite And bJobConfigurable Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite And bPromotionCodeNull Then
' This form variable is used in Component Conditional Actions for EU VAT components
If (Not bComplete Or bIsNew) And bEcReporting And bOrigSite Then
If (sCOStat = "C" Or (Not bOrigSite)) And ThisForm.ParentFormName <> "" Then
' This form variable is used in Component Conditional Actions for Non Inventory Acct components
If (bNonInventoryItem Or (Not bNonInventoryItem And Not bPostJour)) And (sStat <> "F" And sStat <> "C") And
If bNonInventoryItem And dQtyShipped = 0 And (sStat <> "F" And sStat <> "C") Then
If bNonInventoryItem And (sStat <> "F" And sStat <> "C") Then
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite And Not bNonInventoryItem _
'Disable the fields related to PO-CO. Remove the calling in SelectCurrentCompleted() and move it here.
If (Not bComplete Or bIsNew) And bEcReporting And bOrigSite And bSuppl Then
'if the user hit cancel on the modal form,
' clean up NextKeys table for failed X-Ref
' clean up RefNum display, when modal has cancled
If ThisForm.LastModalChildEndedOk = False Or ThisForm.Variables("IsCancel").Value = "1" Then
dNetPrice = Round((((1 - dDisc / 100) * dPriceConv) + dTweak), iDecimalPlaces) * dQtyOrd
dNetPrice = Round(((dQtyOrd * (1 - dDisc / 100) * dPriceConv) + dTweak), iDecimalPlaces)
If Not bCreateFlag And strXrefDestination <> "" Then
ThisForm.Variables("XrefForm").Value = "JobOrders( FILTER(Job='P(RefNum)' and Suffix = 'P(RefLineSuf)') OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh) )"
ThisForm.Variables("XrefForm").Value = "PurchaseOrderLines( FILTER(PoNum ='P(RefNum)' and PoLine='P(RefLineSuf)') OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh) )"
ThisForm.Variables("XrefForm").Value = "PurchaseOrderRequisitionLines( FILTER(ReqNum='P(RefNum)' and ReqLine='P(RefLineSuf)') OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh) )"
' force a value so that filtering will not get confused
' CustItem was changed during update of an existing record - no need to continue
Else ' CustItem did not change during update of an existing record - continue
'Initializing Grids IDOCollection before loading current items feature/options
If dQtyRsvd <> 0 And dQtyRsvd <> dQtyOrderedConv Then
Dim FeatureQtys, Feature, Qtys As String
If Not (bCSIB_97770 And bFranceCP And Not allowNonItemVar) Then
'Do not pop up message if item and shipsite are not changed.
'We only want to retrieve G/L account if this is NonInventory item, or PostJour is False
If bIsNonInventoryItem = False And bIsPostjour = True Then
'Do not retrieve G/L account if item and shipsite are not changed.
'Prevent the AutoInsert row from being created when opening linked from a CO and new rows should not be added.
' Defaults that do not do anything are set as validated on new record.
If bThisIsANew = False Then 'If this is new, don't need this since done by StdObjectNewCompleted
If bThisIsANew = False Then 'If this is new, don't need this since done by StdObjectNewCompleted
If (bPlanned Or bOrdered Or bIsNew) And bOrigSite Then
If Not oApsParmAll Is Nothing And oApsParmAll.Items.Count > 0 Then
If oCOLineCollection.IsCurrentObjectModified() = True Or oCOLineCollection.IsCurrentObjectNew() = True Then
If oCOLineCollection.IsCurrentObjectModified() = True Or oCOLineCollection.IsCurrentObjectNew() = True Then
'CALL API to parse messageContext to get item
If Not apiResponse.Parameters(1).IsNull Then strItem = apiResponse.Parameters(1).GetValue(Of String)()
If bRS7786_5 And Application.Variables("Avail_Cfg").Value = "1" And ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("ItOrderConfigurable") = "1" Then
'Reason code is enabled and required when the unit price differs from the standard price or when the sales discount differs from the standard discount.
'This reason code is used for Automated Pricing Validation with Insights.
If (priceConv <> stdPrice Or disc <> disc1) And NOT bDerNonInventoryItemFlag And bOrigSite Then
